Print a formatted DQ summary report

Source: R/dq.R
dq_report.Rd

Prints an analyst-readable summary of a dq_result object, including data shape, corrections applied by column, and flagged issues grouped by type. Called automatically when a dq_result is printed.

Usage

dq_report(result)

Arguments

result

A dq_result object returned by run_dq_checks().

Value

Invisibly returns result.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
result <- run_dq_checks(raw_data, schema)
result          # print method calls dq_report automatically
dq_report(result)
} # }
